results.title: Ink
results.description: Ink is a React renderer for building command-line applications with a component-based UI experience, utilizing Flexbox layouts in the terminal.

results.title: Ink Select Input
results.description: An Ink component that provides a select input for terminal applications, allowing users to navigate and select items using keyboard controls.

results.title: Ink Text Input
results.description: A text input component for Ink, a React-based library for creating command-line interfaces, offering features like placeholders, masking, and cursor control.

results.title: Ink UI
results.description: Ink UI is a collection of customizable UI components for CLIs built with Ink, offering elements like text inputs, select menus, spinners, and progress bars.

results.title: Ink Picture
results.description: Ink Picture is an image component for Ink CLI/TUI applications that displays images in the terminal with automatic protocol detection and graceful fallbacks, supporting Sixel, Kitty, iTerm2, ASCII art, and more.

results.title: Ink Chart
results.description: Ink Chart provides terminal visualization components for React CLI applications, including sparklines, bar charts, and stacked bar charts with gradient colors and responsive design.

results.title: Ink Markdown
results.description: Render markdown text using Ink, a React-like library for creating command-line interfaces.

results.title: Ink Tab
results.description: Ink Tab is a tab component for Ink, a React-like framework for building command-line user interfaces.

results.title: Vibe Hack and Slash
results.description: A terminal-based hack and slash game implemented in React Ink, featuring automatic battles, Diablo-style item systems, skills, and an AI evaluation system, with experimental Moonbit integration for core logic.

results.title: Wave Terminal
results.description: Wave is an open-source terminal that combines traditional terminal features with graphical capabilities like file previews, web browsing, and AI assistance, running on MacOS, Linux, and Windows.

results.title: Ink
results.description: Ink is a powerful and easy-to-learn scripting language by inkle for writing interactive narrative and branching stories in games.

results.title: Ink Table
results.description: A table component for Ink, a React-like library for creating command-line interfaces.

results.title: Ink Stepper
results.description: Ink Stepper is a step-by-step wizard component designed for Ink terminal applications, facilitating sequential user interactions.

results.title: TUI Realm
results.description: Tui-Realm is a framework for ratatui that simplifies terminal user interface implementation by enabling reusable components with properties and states, inspired by React and Elm, communicating via Messages and Events.

results.title: Rio Terminal
results.description: Rio is a modern terminal emulator built to run everywhere, including macOS, Linux, Windows, and potentially web browsers via WebAssembly.

results.title: Chaterm
results.description: Chaterm is a terminal tool with an AI Agent that simplifies device management by allowing users to interact using natural language instead of complex commands, offering features like smart completion, voice commands, and a visual Vim editor.

results.title: TerminalTextEffects
results.description: TerminalTextEffects (TTE) is a terminal visual effects engine that can be installed as a system application or Python library, featuring advanced animation, color support, and event handling for inline terminal effects.

results.title: Chalk Animation
results.description: Create colorful text animations directly in your terminal output with various pre-defined animation styles.

results.title: Ink Virtual List
results.description: A virtualized list component for Ink terminal applications that renders only visible items for optimal performance with large datasets.

results.title: Ink Testing Library
results.description: Utilities for testing Ink apps, providing functions to render Ink components and interact with their output and input streams.

results.title: VTE GTK4
results.description: VTE is a virtual terminal widget for GTK4, providing terminal emulation capabilities for applications.

results.title: VoiceInk
results.description: VoiceInk is a native macOS application that transcribes spoken words to text almost instantly, offering privacy-focused, offline processing and intelligent features like Power Mode and a Personal Dictionary.

results.title: Laravel React Starter Kit
results.description: The Laravel + React Starter Kit provides a robust, modern starting point for building Laravel applications with a React frontend using Inertia, leveraging React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, and Radix UI.

results.title: Sidekick.nvim
results.description: Sidekick.nvim is a Neovim AI sidekick that integrates Copilot LSP's "Next Edit Suggestions" with a built-in terminal for any AI CLI, allowing users to review diffs, chat with AI assistants, and streamline coding without leaving the editor.

results.title: Manim Voiceover
results.description: Manim Voiceover is a Manim plugin that allows adding voiceovers directly in Python, recording voiceovers via CLI, and using AI voices with per-word animation timing.

results.title: react-window
results.description: react-window is a set of React components designed for efficiently rendering large lists and grids.

results.title: Stripe Terminal React Native
results.description: The Stripe Terminal React Native SDK allows developers to build custom in-person checkout experiences in React Native apps, connecting to pre-certified card readers and integrating with Stripe's payment network.

results.title: Vapi React Native SDK
results.description: This package enables developers to integrate Vapi voice and video calls directly into their React Native applications.

results.title: Mantle React
results.description: A react interface for interacting with the Mantle App API

results.title: Textual Web
results.description: Run TUIs and terminals in your browser
